ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing the match */,
  "ground_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ground where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, bowl) */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., ODI, Test, T20) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, knockout) */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_ground_id FOREIGN KEY ("ground_id") REFERENCES grounds ("ground_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Code for the team (e.g., SL for Sri Lanka) */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grounds" (
  "ground_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground */,
  "ground_name" TEXT /* Name of the ground */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the ground */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ground_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_matches" (
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-match combination */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., c & b, lbw) */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Number of overs bowled by the player */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled by the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "umpire_type" TEXT /* Type of umpire (e.g., on-field, third) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "batting_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings played */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Number of fifties scored */,
  "hundreds" INTEGER /* Number of hundreds scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batting_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_stats" (
  "bowling_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "overs" REAL /* Total overs bowled */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy rate */,
  "best_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures */,
  "five_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of times five wickets were taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowling_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fielding_stats" (
  "fielding_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fielding statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Total catches taken */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Total stumpings made */,
  "runouts" INTEGER /* Total runouts affected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fielding_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fielding_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., bilateral, multi-team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_tournaments" (
  "match_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-tournament combination */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_tournaments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournaments" (
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "player_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player role */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the player in the match (e.g., captain, vice-captain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roles_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_awards" (
  "match_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match award */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_awards_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
